summary: Russian forces destroyed Ukrainian unmanned boats near Tendrov Spit and the Dnipro River mouth using FPV drones. The "Rubicon" Center reported 132 enemy targets destroyed on March 13, including 35.4% unmanned systems, with ongoing FPV anti-drone operations against Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs in Donbas, Sumy, and Krasny Liman directions. Ukraine is developing AI-powered drones like the HX-2, with 6,000 units delivered in 2025, and training AI models using real combat data. Russian air defense systems "Elka" and "Yolka" are intercepting Ukrainian fixed-wing attack UAVs. Ukrainian FPV drones are reportedly hitting targets 100km behind Russian lines, using tactics like smoke screening and chaotic movement to evade detection.
